modification_notice: Extracted only complete Simplified Chinese prose sentences from the checksum-pinned NPS article content container, removed navigation, images, English labels, page furniture, URLs without complete sentences, and incomplete fragments, and added input-only provenance; no trademarks, expected text, or converter output were used.
known_biases: The article is official U.S. national-park visitor guidance and is not representative of ordinary Taiwan traffic.
Travel, outdoor safety, park rules, and U.S.-specific place names are intentionally concentrated.
The source mixes Simplified Chinese with English product, service, and place names.
Only paragraph text inside the NPS article content container is extracted; images, insignia, navigation, and linked third-party content are excluded.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
